title: BetterArmorHUD
description: Colorful armor icons, and toughness/knockback resistance showing
body:
# BetterArmorHUD

![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/Enviroment-Client-blue)
[![Github Release](https://badgen.net/github/release/efekos/BetterArmorHUD)](https://github.com/efekos/BetterArmorHUD)
[![Github Stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/efekos/BetterArmorHUD)](https://github.com/efekos/BetterArmorHUD)
![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/TmdSk6nU?color=00AF5C&logo=modrinth)
![Curse Forge](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_939291_downloads.svg)
[![Discord](https://badgen.net/discord/members/8PPgcmYNf4)](https://efekos.dev/discord)
[![Patreon](https://badgen.net/static/Support/Patreon/orange?icon=patreon)](https://efekos.dev/patreon)
[![Buy me a coffee](https://badgen.net/static/Support/Buy%20Me%20A%20Coffee/yellow?icon=buymeacoffee)](https://efekos.dev/bmac)

Adds colored icons and toughness to armor hud.

* ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/efekos/BetterArmorHUD/master/assets/toughness.png) is toughness.
* ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/efekos/BetterArmorHUD/master/assets/knockback_resistance.png) is knockback resistance.
* ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/efekos/BetterArmorHUD/master/assets/unknown.png) is unknown armors that are probably not from vanilla.
* Other icons are pretty obvious.

Quick showcases:

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/efekos/BetterArmorHUD/master/assets/gallery/mixed_1.png)
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/efekos/BetterArmorHUD/master/assets/gallery/mixed_2.png)

You can visit gallery for more images.
